description_long: This is a male police officer dressed in a modern tactical uniform, featuring a black short-sleeve shirt with blue accents and a high-collared undershirt. He wears a black tactical vest with visible straps and pouches, and a utility belt equipped with various tools. His pants are black and fitted, tucked into sturdy black boots, and his forearms are protected by black gloves and arm guards. The officer's hair is brown and tousled, and he has a serious expression. The uniform includes visible patches and a name tag, with some equipment such as a holstered firearm and radio attached to his belt.
description: A male police officer in a black tactical uniform with blue accents, tactical vest, utility belt, and black boots, equipped for urban duty.
description_view_0: Front view shows the officer's face, tactical vest, blue shirt accents, utility belt, and gloves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the officer, utility belt equipment, and holstered firearm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tactical vest, belt, and boots, with hair detail visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the officer's profile, arm guards, and additional belt equipment.
attribute_uniform_type: Modern tactical police uniform with black short-sleeve shirt, blue accents, tactical vest, fitted black pants, black boots, and utility belt.
attribute_headgear_style: No headgear; brown tousled hair visible.
